items.title: SpaceX is on track for record-setting Starlink deployments
items.summary: SpaceX is currently ahead of last year's record-setting pace for Starlink satellite deployments. SpaceX launched 1,589 Starlink satellites into low-Earth orbit in the first half of 2026, according to launch data compiled by Jonathan McDowell's satellite tracker, compared to 1,489 satellites deployed at the same point in 2025. 2025 was already a record year for […]

items.title: Best Buy knocks up to $900 off Windows Copilot+ PCs/gaming laptops for back-to-school, deals from $300
items.summary: Best Buy is now leaning into its back-to-school push with a fresh batch of deals across Windows laptops and desktops, including newer Copilot+ PCs powered by AMD’s Ryzen AI 400-series and Intel Core Ultra Series 3 “Panther Lake” chips, and more. While some of these machines have already seen discounts during the recent 4th of July sale event, Best Buy is now serving up a handful of new laptop deals starting from $299.99 shipped. If you’re looking to upgrade your setup before classes, work, or the busy fall season kicks in, this is a solid time to check out some of the latest Windows notebooks at reduced prices.

items.title: Today only: Save $150 on Lenovo’s 2025 touchscreen 2-in-1 Chromebook Plus
items.summary: Today only, as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed one of Lenovo’s 14-inch touchscreen 2-in-1 Chromebook Plus models for $429 shipped. Though this 2025 model is listed for $679 right now, it typically goes for $579, and it’s currently fetching its full price directly at Lenovo. It first dropped to $450 during last year’s Black Friday sale before hitting an even lower $399 earlier this year, but today’s deal still knocks $150 off the regular price and lands within $30 of that all-time low. This is one of the newer Chromebooks out there with a touchscreen panel and some other powerful hardware, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: EcoFlow’s Outdoor Season Sale is gearing up folks for adventures with up to 57% power station savings starting from $259
items.summary: EcoFlow currently has an Outdoor Season Sale with up to 57% discounts on power stations running through mid-July. Among the lineup of summer adventure-ready units, you can find some notable scores like the DELTA 3 Ultra Portable Power Station at $1,299 shipped, which matches the price we’re also seeing at Amazon. While it carries a $2,499 MSRP directly from EcoFlow, it’s only really climbed as high as $1,999 in 2026, with discounts usually only going as low as $1,299, though we did see it drop down to $1,199 during last month’s Prime Day event. If you missed out on that lower rate, the good news is you’re still getting a sizeable $700 markdown off the going rate during this sale ($1,200 off the MSRP) for the third-lowest price we have tracked since its release in late 2025. Head below to also browse the sale’s complete lineup of deals while they last.

items.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
items.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]
